name: Librarr
short_desc: Self-hosted book, audiobook, and manga search & download manager — the *arr for books.
description: Self-hosted book, audiobook, and manga search and download manager. Searches multiple indexers in parallel with confidence scoring, auto-imports to Calibre, Audiobookshelf, Kavita, or Komga. Torznab API for Prowlarr integration, OPDS feed, request/approval workflow, Goodreads and StoryGraph CSV import, quality profiles, author monitoring, and series auto-complete. Single Go binary with SQLite — no external database needed, ~14MB RAM idle.
author: JeremiahM37

form_fields.label: API Key (for Torznab/Prowlarr integration — find in app env vars after install)
